name: @tau/desktop
description: A performance-first workspace terminal powered by Electron and xterm.js WebGL
author: Tau Contributors

scripts.bench:latency:budget: TAU_LATENCY_BENCH_MANAGED_TAUD=1 TAU_LATENCY_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAU_LATENCY_BENCH_SAMPLES=60 TAU_LATENCY_MAX_P50_MS=40 TAU_LATENCY_MAX_P95_MS=120 TAU_LATENCY_MAX_P99_MS=180 TAU_LATENCY_MAX_MAX_MS=250 tsx bench/latency-taud.ts
scripts.bench:input-priority:budget: TAU_INPUT_PRIORITY_ENFORCE=1 TAU_INPUT_PRIORITY_SAMPLES=20 TAU_INPUT_PRIORITY_FLOOD_BYTES=8388608 TAU_INPUT_PRIORITY_MAX_P50_MS=250 TAU_INPUT_PRIORITY_MAX_P95_MS=500 TAU_INPUT_PRIORITY_MAX_MAX_MS=1000 TAU_INPUT_PRIORITY_MIN_SLOW_DROPS=1 tsx bench/input-priority-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:attach:budget: TAU_ATTACH_REPLAY_ENFORCE=1 TAU_ATTACH_REPLAY_BYTES=1048576 TAU_ATTACH_MAX_RESPONSE_MS=250 TAU_ATTACH_MAX_SNAPSHOT_MS=100 TAU_ATTACH_MAX_REPLAY_MS=500 tsx bench/attach-replay-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:workspace:budget: TAU_WORKSPACE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAU_WORKSPACE_BENCH_FILES=5000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_BRANCHES_MS=500 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_STATUS_MS=1000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_FILE_TREE_MS=2500 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_DIFF_MS=1000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_PORTS_MS=3000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_PR_MS=2000 tsx bench/workspace-metadata-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:workspace:large:budget: TAU_WORKSPACE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAU_WORKSPACE_BENCH_FILES=50000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_BRANCHES_MS=500 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_STATUS_MS=1000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_FILE_TREE_MS=1000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_DIFF_MS=1000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_PORTS_MS=3000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_PR_MS=2000 tsx bench/workspace-metadata-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:workspace:xl:budget: TAU_WORKSPACE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAU_WORKSPACE_BENCH_FILES=250000 TAU_WORKSPACE_BENCH_GIT_TIMEOUT_MS=180000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_BRANCHES_MS=500 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_STATUS_MS=2500 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_FILE_TREE_MS=2500 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_DIFF_MS=2500 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_PORTS_MS=3000 TAU_WORKSPACE_MAX_PR_MS=2000 tsx bench/workspace-metadata-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:soak:budget: TAU_SOAK_ENFORCE=1 TAU_SOAK_ITERATIONS=5 TAU_SOAK_BYTES=524288 TAU_SOAK_MAX_RSS_GROWTH_KB=65536 TAU_SOAK_MAX_ITERATION_MS=5000 TAU_SOAK_MAX_PENDING_OUTPUT_BYTES=0 TAU_SOAK_MAX_ACTIVE_SUBSCRIBERS=0 tsx bench/taud-soak-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:renderer-combined:budget: TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_ENFORCE=1 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_FILES=25000 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_DIFF_FILES=24 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_MOUNTED_DIFF_FILES=12 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_DIFF_LINES=40 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_TERMINAL_MIB=2 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_DURATION_MS=10000 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_MIN_MBPS=2 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_P95_FRAME_MS=80 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_FRAME_MS=300 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_FRAMES_OVER_16=120 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_FRAMES_OVER_50=8 TAU_COMBINED_RENDERER_MAX_DOM_NODES=12000 tsx bench/run-electron.ts bench/combined-renderer-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:file-tree:budget: TAU_FILE_TREE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAU_FILE_TREE_BENCH_FILES=50000 TAU_FILE_TREE_MAX_RESET_MS=100 TAU_FILE_TREE_MAX_FRAME_MS=150 TAU_FILE_TREE_MAX_DOM_NODES=750 tsx bench/run-electron.ts bench/file-tree-renderer-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:file-tree:xl:budget: TAU_FILE_TREE_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAU_FILE_TREE_BENCH_FILES=250000 TAU_FILE_TREE_MAX_RESET_MS=300 TAU_FILE_TREE_MAX_FRAME_MS=350 TAU_FILE_TREE_MAX_DOM_NODES=750 tsx bench/run-electron.ts bench/file-tree-renderer-benchmark.ts
scripts.bench:reload:budget: TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_RELOAD=1 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_RELOAD_SESSIONS=2 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_OUTPUT_BYTES=4096 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_TIMEOUT_MS=25000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_PROCESS_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MIN_THROUGHPUT_BYTES_PER_SEC=1024 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_PENDING_OUTPUT_BYTES=65536 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_MS=8000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_ATTACH_MS=5000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_ECHO_MS=1000 tsx ../../scripts/package-smoke.ts
scripts.bench:ipc:budget: TAU_IPC_BENCH_ENFORCE=1 TAU_IPC_BENCH_MB=16 TAU_IPC_BENCH_RUNS=2 TAU_IPC_MIN_MESSAGEPORT_MBPS=64 TAU_IPC_MAX_MESSAGEPORT_P99_CONTROL_MS=80 TAU_IPC_MAX_MESSAGEPORT_CONTROL_STALLS_16=8 TAU_IPC_MAX_MESSAGEPORT_DATA_STALLS_16=8 tsx bench/run-electron.ts bench/ipc-benchmark.ts

scripts.bench:app-soak:hour: TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_RELOAD=1 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_RELOAD_SESSIONS=2 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_RELOAD_DURATION_MS=3600000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_RELOAD_INTERVAL_MS=60000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_OUTPUT_BYTES=65536 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_OUTPUT_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_TIMEOUT_MS=30000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_PROCESS_TIMEOUT_MS=3900000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MIN_THROUGHPUT_BYTES_PER_SEC=16384 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_PENDING_OUTPUT_BYTES=65536 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_INPUT_ECHO_MS=500 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_MS=8000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_ATTACH_MS=5000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RELOAD_ECHO_MS=1000 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_MAIN_RSS_GROWTH_KB=524288 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RENDERER_RSS_GROWTH_KB=524288 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_TAUD_RSS_GROWTH_KB=524288 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_MAIN_RSS_KB=1048576 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_RENDERER_RSS_KB=1048576 TAU_ELECTRON_SMOKE_MAX_TAUD_RSS_KB=524288 tsx ../../scripts/package-smoke.ts

scripts.test:persistence: tsx --test src/main/taud-stream.test.ts src/main/taud-client-lifecycle.test.ts src/main/git-state-watcher.test.ts test/terminal-output-writer.test.ts test/workspace-service.test.ts
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm fmt:check && pnpm tsc
